slide_1_description: Consolidate all your assets—cash, bank accounts, and investments—in one secure dashboard.
slide_2_description: Monitor real-time prices of precious metals and track the value of your physical holdings.
slide_3_description: Simply speak to add transactions. AI automatically categorizes and updates your accounts.
currency_description: We'll create a wallet and show all amounts in this currency. You can change it later in settings.
wallet_loading_message:
Getting your wallet ready…
Even pharaohs kept track of their gold!
wallet_error_subtitle: Don't worry — we'll set it up automatically next time you open the app.
wallet_created_in_currency: Your Cash wallet has been created in {{currency}}.
wallet_ready_tracking: You're ready to start tracking like royalty
